articles.title: BLUEOCEANAI REVOLUTIONIZING MARKETING WITH AI AGENTS
articles.summary: In a new AWS case study, BLUEOCEANAI [5] shows how it's doing what dashboards and legacy analytics never could, turning billions of marketing signals into real-time strategy.

articles.title: READ THE AWS CASE STUDY
GOOGLE RELEASES GEMINI 2.5 DEEP THINK FOR AI ULTRA SUBSCRIBERS
articles.summary: Google's most powerful AI model generates multiple solution approaches simultaneously before selecting the best answer. A specialized version that can work for hours on complex problems recently achieved IMO gold medal status and is being shared with select mathematicians.

articles.title: ANTHROPIC CUTS OFF OPENAI'S ACCESS TO ITS CLAUDE MODELS
articles.summary: Anthropic revoked OpenAI's access after discovering the company was using Claude for internal benchmarking and coding assistance ahead of GPT-5's launch, violating terms that forbid using its AI to create and improve competitor models. OpenAI will retain access for safety evaluations and research collaboration on harmful capabilities testing.

articles.title: OPENAI RAISES $8.3 BILLION AS PAID CHATGPT BUSINESS USERS REACH 5 MILLION
articles.summary: The round was part of the broader $40 billion fundraise and completed ahead of schedule, driven by OpenAI's annual recurring revenue jumping from $10 billion to $13 billion since June and projected to hit $20 billion by year-end. Dragoneer led with a $2.8 billion investment, 10% of its entire fund.

articles.title: WILL DATA CENTERS CRASH THE ECONOMY?
articles.summary: Big Tech's $102.5 billion quarterly AI spending now exceeds dot-com era investment as a share of GDP, but the real risk lies in financing through "private credit" funds that operate outside traditional banking oversight. Banks have increased their exposure to these shadow lenders 14x since 2013, creating conditions where a synchronized AI market downturn could trigger defaults on data centers, cascading through private credit funds to their bank and insurance company lenders.

articles.title: TOKENS ARE GETTING MORE EXPENSIVE
articles.summary: Models will always be cheaper next year, but users will expect more of them. The goalpost is always moving ahead. Even Anthropic, which has the most vertically integrated application layer on the planet, can't make a flat subscription with unlimited usage work. Companies without a plan are headed to the graveyard fast, as there are no investors writing checks for negative margin businesses. There's no figuring it out later when your AWS bill is larger than your revenue.

articles.title: ANDREW NG ON CHINA'S AI MOMENTUM
articles.summary: In a detailed thread, Andrew Ng argued that China's open-model ecosystem, rapid semiconductor advances, and aggressive business dynamics give it a credible path to surpass the U.S. in AI.

articles.title: IBM TECHXCHANGE 2025 – AI THAT SHIPS
articles.summary: Forget the hype. This is where AI engineers build what's next.

articles.title: → Register now
DOES THE BITTER LESSON HAVE LIMITS?
articles.summary: General methods that leverage computation are ultimately the most effective by a large margin. The eventual success of approaches based on scaling computation is often tinged with bitterness because it is success over a favored, human-centric approach. Developers need to be aware that their work might be overtaken by compute, but this shouldn't stop them from applying custom, human-crafted logic to get the job done.

articles.title: PERSONA VECTORS: MONITORING AND CONTROLLING CHARACTER TRAITS IN LANGUAGE MODELS
articles.summary: Researchers extracted "persona vectors" by comparing neural network activity when models exhibit specific traits versus when they don't, revealing that personality changes follow predictable mathematical patterns. This discovery enables a counterintuitive "vaccination" approach that purposefully steers models toward undesirable traits during training to compensate for their tendency to “overfit” to negative traits.

articles.title: COHERE'S COMMAND A VISION
articles.summary: Cohere has launched Command A Vision, an open-weight 111B parameter vision-language model designed for business use cases. It reportedly surpasses GPT-4.1 and Llama 4 Maverick on enterprise benchmarks.

articles.title: SEED-PROVER: DEEP AND BROAD REASONING FOR AUTOMATED THEOREM PROVING
articles.summary: ByteDance's Seed-Prover proved 5 of 6 problems at IMO 2025, the third AI system to do so, and the first Chinese model, in recent weeks. The system combines "lemma-style" whole-proof reasoning that breaks problems into modular components with three-tiered inference strategies from quick refinements to days-long reasoning that accumulates thousands of mathematical facts.

articles.title: HOW WINDSURF'S FOUNDERS GOT PAID FROM THE GOOGLE DEAL
articles.summary: New details show Google's $2.4B licensing deal with Windsurf split evenly between investors and compensation for 40 employees hired by Google, including co-founders Varun Mohan and Douglas Chen.

articles.title: AI'S OVERLOOKED $97 BILLION CONTRIBUTION TO THE ECONOMY
articles.summary: The US economy grew at an annual rate of 3% in the second quarter. Americans enjoyed roughly $97 billion in consumer surplus (the difference between the maximum a consumer is willing to pay for a good or service and its actual price) from generative AI tools in 2024. Around 40% of US adults are regular users of generative AI. As more digital goods become available for free, measuring benefits as well as costs will become increasingly important.

articles.title: MONITOR YOUR AI AGENTS WITH SENTRY
articles.summary: Agents break unpredictably when they hit prod. Debug the entire run: prompts, model calls, tool spans, and errors, linked to the user action that triggered it — within the same Sentry you use — Try it

articles.title: now
AI REFERRALS TO TOP WEBSITES WERE UP 357% YEAR-OVER-YEAR IN JUNE, REACHING 1.13B
articles.summary: AI referrals to websites surged 357% year-over-year in June, reaching 1.13 billion, with ChatGPT responsible for over 80% of these referrals.

articles.title: BUILD YOUR OWN AI APP BUILDER WITH THE V0 PLATFORM API
articles.summary: The v0 Platform API provides developers with a text-to-app interface, enabling automation of web app creation and code generation using LLM-generated UIs.

articles.title: XAI TESTS TEAM ACCOUNTS FOR GROK AS COMPETITION HEATS UP
articles.summary: xAI appears to be testing a Teams plan for Grok that will let users toggle between personal and dedicated Team accounts.

articles.title: RELEASE: POWER ATTENTION
articles.summary: Manifest AI has open-sourced Power Attention, which replaces Flash Attention in any transformer.
